note: Cross-validation of exact derived values against QUDT stated floats. exact: literal equality of rationals. truncation: QUDT literal is the exact value correctly rounded at its own precision (half-ulp criterion) — benign float publication. DISCREPANCY: disagreement beyond stated precision — analysed in qudt-discrepancies.md.

discrepancies.how: atom [IAU 2012 Resolution B2: 1 au = 149 597 870 700 m, exact]
atom [US dry barrel = 7056 in^3 (15 USC 234); QUDT evidently used the approximate 105-dry-quart identity — see discrepancy report]

atom [faraday = e x N_A = 96485.33212331001840 C exact (SI Brochure 9th ed. Table 1: e, N_A exact since 2019)]
atom [footlambert = (1/pi) cd/ft^2, exact with symbolic pi (QUDT factor list [CD^1 FT^-2] omits the 1/pi)]
atom [momme = 3.75 g exact (Japanese pearl trade convention; QUDT states 3.750, a 1000x error — see discrepancy report)]
prefix Milli (10^n/2^n exact, SI Brochure Table 7) x OSM
atom [normal cubic metre = 101325/(R x 273.15) = 44.6150334... mol exact (R exact since SI 2019; QUDT states 0.0 — see discrepancy report)]
atom [normal cubic metre (0 degC, 1 atm) = 44.6150334... mol exact]
atom [okta = 1/8 of sky cover, definition (QUDT states 0.0 — see discrepancy report)]
atom [osmole = 1 mol of osmotically active entities, convention (QUDT states 0.0 — see discrepancy report)]
atom [speed-of-light velocity unit = 299792458 m/s exact (SI 2019; QUDT states 0.0 — see discrepancy report)]
atom [US tablespoon = gal_us/256 (= fl oz/2) exact]
atom [shipping/freight (measurement) ton = 40 ft^3 (QUDT states the 40 ft^3 value for the UK entry too; UK shipping ton is 42 ft^3 in some sources — see discrepancy report)]
